privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real forensic test data downloaded from the DFTT project (NTFS File Recovery Test Image). The target case name is 'DA_Report_Case_2024' with case number 'INV-RPT-006'. The required disk image path is '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd'. The agent must generate an HTML report using Autopsy and write a case summary memo to '/home/ga/Reports/case_summary_memo.txt' containing specific results that align with the ground truth computed by the 'fls' command in setup_task.sh.
